column1: # psst pack: modern-unix — friendly reminders that nicer tools exist
# tags: '-' for none; unless=<tool> skips the hint when that tool is already installed/active

column6: bat is cat with wings — syntax highlighting & line numbers (brew install bat)
eza is a modern ls — colors, git status, tree view (brew install eza)
ripgrep (rg) is grep at ludicrous speed, gitignore-aware (brew install ripgrep)
fd is find with sane syntax: fd pattern (brew install fd)
btop is top from the future (brew install btop)
dust shows disk usage you can actually read (brew install dust)
duf makes df pretty and readable (brew install duf)
sd is sed for humans: sd 'old' 'new' file (brew install sd)
tldr gives examples instead of walls of text (brew install tlrc)
delta makes diffs beautiful (brew install git-delta)
procs is a modern ps with colors & search (brew install procs)
doggo is a friendlier dig (brew install doggo)
micro is nano evolved — mouse, tabs, syntax colors (brew install micro)
zoxide learns your dirs — 'z proj' jumps from anywhere (brew install zoxide)
